creator: direct727@gmail.com
text:
libobjc2 will not compile on FreeBSD 10.x on arm. I believe this issue has occurred since the change to clang 3.4. There was no problem when clang was at 3.3.

I am using a Raspberry Pi.

root@raspberry-pi:/usr/ports/lang/libobjc2 # make MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes install clean
